name: Lounes Mechouek
title: Applied AI & Engineering
tagline: At the Intersection of Engineering and Applied Intelligence.
description: Developing robust methodologies and production-grade systems for high-stakes AI, with a focus on methodology, clinical NLP, high-quality synthetic data generation, and LLM-driven systems.

focusAreas.title: Reliable AI Systems
focusAreas.description: Building controlled LLM, RAG and agentic systems with validation evaluation, and deterministic safeguards.

focusAreas.title: Clinical Decision Support
focusAreas.description: Designing AI and NLP systems that support clinicians, streamline workflows, and improve patient care.

focusAreas.title: Custom AI Systems
focusAreas.description: Developing tailored systems for domain-specific needs in modeling, probabilistic reasong, and decision workflows.

focusAreas.title: Applied Research
focusAreas.description: Creating rigorous evaluation setups and open tools that help others study, test, and extend systems.
